message:
feat(fsqlite-types): add wasm-compatible sync primitive polyfills

Create `sync_primitives` module that provides platform-agnostic Mutex,
RwLock, Once, Condvar, and thread_id utilities:

- On native targets: re-exports parking_lot types for performance
- On wasm32 targets: thin wrappers around std::sync with poison
  recovery, matching parking_lot's API surface

This enables downstream crates to gradually migrate from direct
parking_lot imports to `fsqlite_types::sync_primitives::*`, which
compiles on both native and wasm32-unknown-unknown without #[cfg]
at every call site.

Also adds parking_lot as a cfg(not(wasm32)) dependency of fsqlite-types,
consolidating the sync primitive source-of-truth in one crate.

Includes 9 unit tests covering Mutex lock/unlock/try_lock, RwLock
read/write, Once idempotency, Condvar notify, into_inner, and
thread_id polyfill.

Implements bead bd-wba3f (WASM 1.2).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
